name: Dynamic Skill Router
description: Replaces static full-skill injection with semantic retrieval — injects only the top 10 relevant skills per turn based on user message embedding. 95% token savings.

topK.description: Max skills to inject per turn

useVoyage.description: Use Voyage embeddings for retrieval (default: true, falls back to BM25)

indexPath.description: Path to skill index SQLite DB (default: ~/.openclaw/skill_router/index.db)
